caption: The video appears to be a news broadcast from News18 India, focusing on a political event or meeting. The scene shows a group of individuals seated at a long table with microphones and floral arrangements, suggesting a formal press conference or meeting. The backdrop prominently displays "INDIA" along with the text "NATIONAL DEVELOPMENT INCLUSIVE ALLIANCE," indicating the context of the discussion is likely related to national development policies. The top banner poses a question about future political alliances, specifically mentioning JDU (Janata Dal United) and the year 2024. The side panels feature images and names of various political figures, including Samrat Choudhuri, Vijay Sinha, Nitesh Kumar, Santosh Sumon, and Sumit Kumar, highlighting their involvement or relevance to the ongoing discussion. The breaking news ticker at the bottom emphasizes the urgency and importance of the event being covered. The time stamps show the broadcast occurring around 10:07 PM and 10:08 PM.
